title: Deliver close verdict
description: Output shape for Deliver Agent's close conversation. Verdict A/B/C/D per templates/deliver-close-taxonomy.md. Verdict C or D triggers MANDATORY_CHECKPOINT close_taxonomy_C_or_D (process/delivery-loop.md §4.2.3 item 7); in_scope: false triggers scope_deviation MANDATORY_CHECKPOINT.

verdict.description: A=clean pass; B=acceptable with minor fixes; C=scope-broadening; D=non-convergent. See templates/deliver-close-taxonomy.md for subclasses.

in_scope.description: Deliver's claim that the sub-sprint stayed within charter.approved_scope. The orchestrator's deterministic scope_envelope_check (process/delivery-loop.md §4.2.5) is the source of truth; if scope_envelope_check disagrees, Deliver's claim is overridden and scope_deviation fires.

next_subsprint.description: Sub-sprint id to advance to. null if this was the last sub-sprint of the milestone (milestone_close fires next).

reason.description: Paragraph rationale for the verdict; cites Code Reviewer's findings if relevant.

code_reviewer_findings_ref.description: Optional path to the codex-findings.md verdict Deliver consumed.

handoff_section_12_co_signers.description: Optional list of who co-signed handoff §12 close note (Deliver + Customer if present).
